meta.title: NOXIOAI — AI employees for your business
meta.description: NOXIOAI is a visual online office of AI employees: marketing, social media, customer support and development — run your business from one screen. Coming soon; join the waitlist.

hero.subtitle: NOXIOAI is a visual online office: named AI employees with real personalities who handle your marketing, social media, customer support and web/app development — Persian-native, built for the Iranian market.

team.heading: Meet your team
team.sub: Every employee is a specialist with their own personality — all at desks in your office.

nika.name: Nika
nika.desc: Campaigns, copy and SEO content — Nika builds your brand.

dara.name: Dara
dara.desc: Technical guidance for your site and app, from idea to code — Dara has your back.

sara.name: Sara
sara.desc: Ready-to-send replies in a perfect professional tone — customers keep coming back.

avisa.name: Avisa
avisa.desc: Instagram & Telegram posts, captions and content calendars — always on time.

office.title: A visual office
office.desc: See your employees in a living pixel office — every desk is a specialist.

brain.title: Business Brain
brain.desc: Describe your business once; every employee knows it and works in your tone.

persian.title: Truly Persian
persian.desc: Not machine translation — natural Persian, Jalali calendar, real understanding of the Iranian market.

channels.title: Instagram & Telegram
channels.desc: Built for the channels Iranian businesses actually use.

one.title: Introduce your business
one.desc: A few minutes about what you do — this becomes your team's Brain.

two.title: Pick your employees
two.desc: Nika, Dara, Sara and more — seat whoever you need at a desk.

three.title: Delegate the work
three.desc: Content, customer replies, technical guidance — from one screen.

one.q: What exactly do the AI employees do?
one.a: Each employee has a specialty: Nika creates marketing content and campaigns, Sara drafts customer replies, Dara gives technical guidance for your site and app, and Avisa plans Instagram & Telegram content. You give the final approval — you're always in control.

two.q: Is the Persian actually natural, or machine translation?
two.a: NOXIOAI is built Persian-first from the ground up: natural tone, correct half-spaces, the Jalali calendar, and real understanding of the Iranian market. Persian is the product's first language, not a translated second one.

three.a: V1 is in active development. Waitlist members get invited first — leave your email to hold your place.

four.a: Pricing isn't final yet, but it will be in Toman and sized for Iranian businesses — and waitlist members get a launch discount.

waitlist.heading: Get in before everyone else
waitlist.sub: V1 is on its way. Leave your email to hear first — no spam, ever.
waitlist.success: You're in! Good news coming soon. 🎉
waitlist.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
waitlist.fallback: The form isn't live yet; email us at:
